caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television screen that displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in glowing yellow letters. The man on the left has short graying hair and wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right has reddish hair and a beard, wearing a gray t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them is a shelf filled with numerous DVD or game cases. Overlaid on the image is a smaller video window showing various cinematic scenes. In the first scene, a figure in red clothing is visible in a dimly lit environment. The second scene shows a group of silhouetted figures standing in a desolate, gray landscape. The third scene features a close-up of a character in red facing a dark, armored figure. In the final scene, the dark armored figure is shown more clearly against a yellow-toned background. The men's facial expressions remain mostly neutral and contemplative throughout.
